25982.title: Non-Stop 80s Hits!
25982.description: We got hits... We got hits from the 80s. And guess what? They don't stop! You're welcome!

25983.title: Gold! Greatest Hits Of The 80s
25983.description: Pencil us in because we've organised the greatest hits of the '80s for you...you're welcome!

25984.title: I Want My MTV 80s!
25984.description: We've gone back to the 80s here at MTV and we're saluting big hair, power suits and a decade of pure pop icons. It's non-stop nostalgia right here at MTV 80s!

25985.title: Forever 80s
25985.description: Check out all of the best hits from one of the biggest decades in music!

25986.title: Electric 80s!
25986.description: Tune in as we play all of the biggest electronic hits from the 80s!

25987.title: Greatest 80s Rock: Play It Loud!
25987.description: Hard! Alternative! Heavy! Post-punk! Metal! Indie! Goth! Call it what you want, but turn up the volume as we delve into the decade's best rock tracks in all their incarnations, right here on MTV80s!

32627.title: ... So 80s!
32627.description: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!
